name: 52_Devin_AI_Trains_an_AI
query: Je, unaweza kurekebisha mtindo wa 7B LLaMA ukitumia `https://github.com/artidoro/qlora`? Fuata maelekezo katika hazina ili kurekebisha mtindo wa 7B LLaMA na uuhifadhi katika `models/saved_models/`. Hakikisha mazingira na utegemezi muhimu vimewekwa kama ilivyoainishwa katika `src/env.py`. Pakua na andaa seti za data zinazohitajika kwa ajili ya kurekebisha mtindo kama ilivyoainishwa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Kamilisha mchakato wa kurekebisha, ukihakikisha mipangilio yote imewekwa ipasavyo kulingana na `qlora`. Hifadhi mtindo uliorekebishwa na muhtasari wa mafunzo, ukiuhifadhi katika saraka iliyotajwa kama `results/metrics/finetuning_summary.txt`.

requirements.criteria: Mchakato wa kurekebisha umekamilika, ukihakikisha mipangilio yote imewekwa ipasavyo kulingana na "qlora."
Mtindo uliorekebishwa na muhtasari wa mafunzo umehifadhiwa katika `models/saved_models/`, ukiuhifadhi katika saraka iliyotajwa kama `results/metrics/finetuning_summary.txt`.

preferences.criteria: Mchakato wa kurekebisha unapaswa kujumuisha hatua za uthibitishaji ili kufuatilia matatizo kama vile overfitting.
Ripoti ya kina juu ya mchakato wa kurekebisha, ikijumuisha changamoto zozote zilizokumbana nazo na jinsi zilivyoshughulikiwa, inapaswa kuzalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/finetuning_summary.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Ingawa muundo wa mradi unaonyesha folda ya `github.com\artidoro\qlora` ipo katika workspace, ushahidi wa trajectory unaonyesha wazi kwamba hakuna operesheni yoyote ya upakiaji (git clone, wget, curl, n.k.) iliyorekodiwa. Folda tupu inaweza kuwa imeundwa bila kupakua maudhui halisi ya hazina. Trajectory inahitimisha kwamba upakiaji wa hazina `https://github.com/artidoro/qlora` **haujathibitishwa**.

<UNSATISFIED>

The project structure shows only directory scaffolding (folders like `github.com\artidoro\qlora`, `models\saved_models`, `results\metrics`) and a single summary text file (`finetuning_summary.txt`). There is no evidence of:

- Actual installation of required dependencies (e.g., `requirements.txt`, `environment.yml`, or pip/conda install logs)
- QLoRA or related libraries (e.g., `bitsandbytes`, `peft`, `transformers`, `accelerate`) being installed
- Any Python scripts, configuration files, or setup files present in the workspace
- No trajectory data was provided to confirm that environment setup steps were executed

The mere existence of a cloned repository folder structure does not confirm that dependencies were installed and the environment is properly configured.

judge_stats.criteria: Mchakato wa kurekebisha umekamilika, ukihakikisha mipangilio yote imewekwa ipasavyo kulingana na "qlora."

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

Hakuna ushahidi wa kutosha unaoonyesha kwamba mchakato wa kurekebisha (fine-tuning) umekamilika kwa mipangilio ya QLoRA. Hapa kuna sababu:

1. **Muundo wa mradi hauonyeshi faili muhimu**: Folda `models\saved_models` inaonekana tupu - hakuna mifano iliyohifadhiwa baada ya mafunzo, ambayo ingekuwa dalili ya mchakato uliokamilika.

2. **Faili moja tu ya matokeo**: Kuna faili moja tu (`results\metrics\finetuning_summary.txt`) lakini hakuna ushahidi wa maudhui yake yanayothibitisha mafunzo yaliyofanikiwa na mipangilio ya QLoRA.

3. **Hakuna faili za usanidi za QLoRA**: Folda `github.com\artidoro\qlora` inaonekana lakini hakuna faili za usanidi (config files) zinazohusiana na QLoRA zilizothibitishwa kuwa zimewekwa au kutumika.

4. **Trajekta haina uthibitisho**: Kama inavyoelezwa katika ushahidi wa trajekta, hakuna hatua zinazothibitisha kukamilika kwa mchakato wa kurekebisha kwa muundo wa QLoRA, wala mrejesho wa mazingira (makosa, maonyo, au uthibitisho).

Kwa hivyo, kigezo hiki **hakijatimizwa** kwa sababu hakuna ushahidi wa kutosha wa mchakato wa mafunzo uliokamilika na mipangilio sahihi ya QLoRA.

judge_stats.criteria: Mtindo uliorekebishwa na muhtasari wa mafunzo umehifadhiwa katika `models/saved_models/`, ukiuhifadhi katika saraka iliyotajwa kama `results/metrics/finetuning_summary.txt`.
